Bash(cd C:/PythonProject && python -c "
print\('=== LG GeoView - Full Verification ==='\)
print\(\)

print\('[1] Checking imports...'\)
import pandas as pd
import folium
import plotly
import streamlit
from streamlit_folium import st_folium
print\('    All packages OK'\)

print\('[2] Checking project modules...'\)
from src.data_loader import load_from_csv, load_from_upload, load_from_google_sheets, assign_strength, get_area_summary
from src.map_builder import build_map, MAP_STYLES
from src.charts import members_by_area_chart, groups_by_area_chart, strength_pie_chart, area_detail_table
print\('    All modules OK'\)

print\('[3] Loading sample data...'\)
df = load_from_csv\(\)
print\(f'    Loaded {len\(df\)} rows, {df.area.nunique\(\)} areas'\)

print\('[4] Assigning strength...'\)
df = assign_strength\(df\)
strong = len\(df[df.strength == \\"Strong\\"]\)
medium = len\(df[df.strength == \\"Medium\\"]\)
weak = len\(df[df.strength == \\"Weak\\"]\)
print\(f'    Strong: {strong}, Medium: {medium}, Weak: {weak}'\)

print\('[5] Area summary...'\)
summary = get_area_summary\(df\)
print\(f'    {len\(summary\)} areas summarized'\)

print\('[6] Building maps...'\)
for style_name in MAP_STYLES:
    m = build_map\(df, style_name\)
    assert m is not None
    print\(f'    {style_name} - OK'\)

print\('[7] Building charts...'\)
fig1 = members_by_area_chart\(df\)
fig2 = groups_by_area_chart\(df\)
fig3 = strength_pie_chart\(df\)
print\('    All 3 charts OK'\)

print\('[8] Drill-down table...'\)
detail = area_detail_table\(df, 'Kukatpally'\)
print\(f'    Kukatpally: {len\(detail\)} groups'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== ALL CHECKS PASSED ==='\)
")

Bash(cd C:/PythonProject && python -c "
print\('=== LG GeoView - Real Data Verification ==='\)
print\(\)

from src.data_loader import load_from_excel, assign_strength, get_area_summary
from src.map_builder import build_map, MAP_STYLES
from src.charts import members_by_area_chart, groups_by_area_chart, strength_pie_chart, area_detail_table

print\('[1] Loading Excel data...'\)
df = load_from_excel\(\)
print\(f'    Loaded {len\(df\)} care groups across {df.area.nunique\(\)} areas'\)
print\(\)

print\('[2] Assigning strength...'\)
df = assign_strength\(df\)
for s in ['Strong', 'Medium', 'Weak']:
    count = len\(df[df.strength == s]\)
    print\(f'    {s}: {count}'\)
print\(\)

print\('[3] Data overview:'\)
for _, row in df.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f'    {row.area:20s} | {row.leader_name:20s} | Fam:{row.families:3d} Ind:{row.individuals:3d} Tot:{row.members:3d} | {row.strength}'\)
print\(\)

print\('[4] Area summary:'\)
summary = get_area_summary\(df\)
for _, row in summary.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f'    {row.area:20s} | Groups:{int\(row.total_groups\):2d} | Members:{int\(row.total_members\):3d} | Avg:{row.avg_members:.1f} | {row.strength}'\)
print\(\)

print\('[5] Building maps...'\)
for style in MAP_STYLES:
    m = build_map\(df, style\)
    print\(f'    {style} - OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('[6] Building charts...'\)
fig1 = members_by_area_chart\(df\)
fig2 = groups_by_area_chart\(df\)
fig3 = strength_pie_chart\(df\)
print\('    All 3 charts OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('[7] Drill-down test...'\)
detail = area_detail_table\(df, 'Kukatpally'\)
print\(f'    Kukatpally: {len\(detail\)} groups'\)
print\(detail.to_string\(index=False\)\)

print\(\)
print\('=== ALL CHECKS PASSED ==='\)
")

")
